title: HDFC Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Life Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance:
HDFC Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance!
